ORNNS_FORGE.title: Ornn's Forge
ORNNS_FORGE.pages.INITIAL.description: Sparks fall like rain. A massive smith stands by the forge, hammer in hand. Ornn glances at you once, then taps the anvil as if to say: pay properly, or bleed for what you take.
ORNNS_FORGE.pages.GREET.description: Ornn grunts and tosses you a pouch of gold that looks like spare change from a god. Best leave before he changes his mind.
ORNNS_FORGE.pages.FAIR_TRADE.description: Ornn accepts your payment and places a blazing relic into your hands. It beats with the weight of a forged heart.
ORNNS_FORGE.pages.GRAB_AND_RUN.descripti: You burst out of the forge in a shower of sparks, clutching your prize while your chest burns from the punishment. Behind you, Ornn's snort rattles the floor.
